name: Test Drive Unlimited Solar Crown
short_description: TDUSC is a lifestyle and social experience that redefines what an open-world racing game can be. Explore a fully recreated Hong Kong Island. Take to the road behind the wheel of exceptional cars and live the ultimate life of luxury.
detailed_description:
SEASON 5


About the Game

(Re)discover the Test Drive Unlimited experience

After leaving its mark on players with its first two installments, Test Drive Unlimited is back—reinventing the standards of massively multiplayer open-world racing games. Express your passion for cars through innovative gameplay and exceptional attention to detail. Test and purchase vehicles directly from dealerships, customize them in workshops, and showcase them in the garage of your suite at the Solar Hotel. Every car offers a unique driving experience and complete immersion (windows, sunroofs, engine sounds…), and it’s precisely for that experience that you choose it.

“Hong Kong Island and Ibiza: your playgrounds”

Travel the roads of two dream destinations: Hong Kong Island and Ibiza. Recreated in full at a 1:1 scale, Hong Kong is filled with unique places to explore—from narrow traditional alleys to major expressways, through mountains and beaches. Your drives will be unlike any other. You can also enjoy the stunning island of Ibiza: weave through the heart of Dalt Vila, spend time along the city’s docks, or escape onto wilder trails.

“Complete your collection”

Acquire iconic models from the world’s greatest manufacturers: Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche, Bugatti, Koenigsegg, Aston Martin, and many more… More than 120 cars from 30 brands are represented, from 1960s daily drivers to ultra-modern hypercars and even off-road vehicles.

“Shine in the eyes of other players”

Shape your avatar in your own image and become a key figure: craft your outfits using the various boutiques, then meet other players in social hubs such as the Solar Hotel, the Casino with its slot machines and poker tables, or car dealerships. These are perfect places to meet others and enjoy the Test Drive Unlimited Solar Crown experience together.

“A wide variety of activities”

Stay alert and explore all available activities: in addition to classic game modes like races, off-road races, and time trials, discover more unique gameplay such as vehicle deliveries and Taxi missions. Be sure to join the weekly events as well—they’ll reward you with exclusive prizes.

Key Features
  • Live the ultimate Test Drive Unlimited experience: unparalleled lifestyle elements and driving experience.
  • Explore hyper-realistic 1:1 scale recreations of Hong Kong Island and the sunny landscapes of Ibiza.
  • Collect over 120 iconic cars, from timeless classics to modern hypercars.
  • Create your unique avatar and become a social icon in vibrant player hubs.
  • Experience endless adventure with diverse activities and fresh weekly events.

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Korean, Polish, Russian, Portuguese - Brazil, Turkish, Vietnamese, Simplified Chinese*, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, Arabic, Portuguese - Portugal
*languages with full audio support
